nasb.text: Simon answered and said, “Master, we worked hard all night and caught nothing, but I will do as You say and let down the nets.”

esv.text: And Simon answered, “Master, we toiled all night and took nothing! But at your word I will let down the nets.”

cnv.text: 西門說：“主啊，我們整夜勞苦，毫無所得，不過，我願照你的話下網。”

ccb.text: 西门说：“老师，我们劳碌了一整夜，一无所获，但既然你这样吩咐，我就照你的话做。”

csbs.text: 西门回答说：“老师，我们劳碌了一整夜，什么也没有捕到。不过按照你的话，我就下网吧。”
